name: PT Kobexindo Tractors Tbk
summary: PT Kobexindo Tractors Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the distribution and servicing of heavy equipment in Indonesia. It offers excavators, articulated dump trucks, wheel loaders, and hydraulic breakers; diesel-powered forklifts; rigid dump trucks; heavy duty trucks; fork lift trucks; farm tractors; compact forklifts; and spare parts. The company also provides maintenance and rental services for heavy equipment; and engages in the rental of office building. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in North Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Kobexindo Tractors Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Kobexindo Investama.
